rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core problem is separating a general brand (halo) effect from specific image associations to estimate WTP, and it explicitly claims to extend prior attitudinal-choice latent-variable work on this issue. The cited 2001 paper directly introduces that decomposition (BSA vs. GBI/general brand impression) for brand ratings and halo-like bias, making it a plausible foundational mechanism/method source rather than an incidental mention.
